name: ERROR
ability: You might register as dead. All but 2 live players die. Each night*, choose 2 players: they are regurgitated. Evil only wins if all players (except Travellers) live.
flavor: Deeper. Ravenswood's walls stand ten-thousand feet tall. Ravenswood's walls' walls stand ten-thousand feet more. Deeper. This time will be different. Deeper. (v2.4) (token by Diamondwar)

jinxes.reason: If the ERROR regurgitates the Grandchild, the Grandmother is regurgitated too.
If the Monk is chosen by the ERROR, the Monk is poisoned until dawn.
If the ERROR is in play, the Banshee may only nominate once per day and vote once per nomination.
A Ravenkeeper killed by the ERROR doesn't use their ability. A Ravenkeeper chosen by the ERROR uses their ability but does not die.
A Sage killed by the ERROR doesn't use their ability. A Sage chosen by the ERROR uses their ability but does not die.
A Farmer killed by the ERROR doesn't use their ability. A Farmer chosen by the ERROR uses their ability but does not die.
The ERROR knows who the King is.
If the ERROR regurgitates the King, the Choirboy learns the ERROR is one of two players.
If the ERROR is in play, the Goon has their ability even if dead.
If the ERROR is in play, the player chosen by the Godfather is regurgitated instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the player chosen by the Assassin is regurgitated instead, even if for some reason they could not be.
If the ERROR is chosen by the Exorcist, they learn who the Exorcist is and don't wake tonight and the Exorcist is poisoned.
If the ERROR is in play, the Mayor's ability is "2 or less players are dead" instead. If the Mayor is chosen by the ERROR, another player might be regurgitated instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Scarlet Woman's ability is "3 or more players dead" instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the first time the Lunatic dies, they live but register as dead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Snake Charmer may choose a dead player. If the ERROR is chosen by the Snake Charmer, the new ERROR does not kill.
If an ERROR is summoned, the ERROR kills all but five players instead. If the Summoner summons a dead player into the ERROR, the ERROR has already "died once".
If the ERROR is in play, the player chosen by the Psychopath is regurgitated instead.
If the ERROR is in play, the Snitch has their ability even if dead.
If the Princess nominated and executed a player on their first day, the ERROR doesn't wake tonight.

If the ERROR is in play, the Pixie's ability is "You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk. If you were & are mad as this character & they are dead, you have their ability." and they have this ability even if dead.
If the ERROR is in play and the player chosen by the Witch nominates, they don't die and instead are poisoned and all players learn this.
If the ERROR is in play, the Lycanthrope instead chooses two dead players. If both are good, they are regurgitated and the ERROR doesn't wake tonight.
If the ERROR is in play and the Saint dies to execution, the ERROR's team wins.
